Author: Anomek
Name: UltiSim
Punchline: Simulate ultimate raid mechanics solo. Go to inn and start practice. WARNING: restart game after practice
Description: Spawns fake party members and bosses client-side so you can practice ultimate raid mechanics without a full party. This plugin is in beta and is unstable. You won't crash during your training sessions, but you will crash after it. If you are doing any serious content: **RESTART YOUR GAME AFTER USING PLUGIN**. You **WILL CRASH** in the middle of pull.
